subComponents.name: textArea/field
subComponents.description: The multiline text field. Handles all interaction states independently. Can be used standalone.

subComponents.name: input/label
subComponents.description: The label block. Shared with TextInput. Includes label text, optional help icon, optional helper link, and optional description line.

subComponents.name: input/feedback-text
subComponents.description: The feedback/validation text below the field. Three types: info, error, success. Shared with TextInput.

variants.name: default
variants.description: No structural variants — variation is controlled through props.

sizes.name: default
sizes.description: Height is not fixed. The field grows with content or is constrained by the container. Border radius 12px (rectangular — not pill shaped).

wrapperStates.name: error
wrapperStates.description: Validation failed. Red border and red feedback text.

wrapperStates.name: success
wrapperStates.description: Validation passed. Green feedback text. Note: spelled correctly as 'success', unlike TextInput's wrapper which uses 'succeded'.

fieldInteractionStates.name: Default
fieldInteractionStates.description: Empty, not focused. Shows placeholder text.

fieldInteractionStates.name: Focus
fieldInteractionStates.description: Focused. Cursor and text content visible. Dark border.

fieldInteractionStates.name: filled
fieldInteractionStates.description: Has a value, not focused. Default border. Value text visible.

fieldInteractionStates.name: blocked
fieldInteractionStates.description: Not interactive (disabled). Lighter background. Muted text. Note: named 'blocked' in Figma, not 'disable' as in TextInput.

anatomyParts.name: Label
anatomyParts.description: Label block containing label text, help icon, helper link, and description.

anatomyParts.name: HelpIcon
anatomyParts.description: Question mark icon. Shown when labelHelpShow is true.

anatomyParts.name: HelperLink
anatomyParts.description: Right-aligned text link in the label row.

anatomyParts.name: Field
anatomyParts.description: The multiline text input area. Variable height. Border-radius 12px.

anatomyParts.name: TextContent
anatomyParts.description: Shows placeholder or entered value text depending on state.

anatomyParts.name: ResizeHandle
anatomyParts.description: Visual resize affordance in the bottom-right corner of the field (4.5px decorative element).

anatomyParts.name: FeedbackText
anatomyParts.description: Single-line message below the field. Color varies by type: info, error, success.

TextArea.name: status
TextArea.description: Validation state. Controls border and feedback text style.

TextArea.name: labelShow
TextArea.description: Show or hide the label block.

TextArea.name: labelHelpShow
TextArea.description: Show help icon and helper link in the label.

TextArea.name: labelDescription
TextArea.description: Show the description line in the label.

TextArea.name: descriptionShow
TextArea.description: Show or hide the feedback text below the field.

TextAreaField.name: value
TextAreaField.description: Current value shown in filled/focus/error states.

notes: TextArea shares input/label (5082:730) and input/feedback-text (5082:753) sub-components with TextInput.
The textArea/field sub-component (2035:12768) is unique to TextArea.
The disabled state is named 'blocked' in Figma (not 'disable' as in TextInput's InputField).
The disabled text token is --element/text-muted (#929fb1), not --input/text-disabled.
The wrapper validation states use 'success' (correctly spelled), unlike TextInput which uses 'succeded'.
The field uses border-radius 12px (rectangular), not pill shaped.
A resize affordance is visible as a 4.5px decorative element in the bottom-right corner of the field.
